title: Beta's Better Weapons
description: A datapack that adds a few new weapon types
body:
# Beta's Beter Weapons
  Minecraft's combat has seemed stale lately. This pack is a way to try and fix that. It adds 3 new types of weapons (probably more to come), a whole new set of tools, alternatives to the Totem of Undying, and more! you can read about each of the features below.

## New weapons
I added 3 new weapon types to the game, each with their own benifits and drawbacks.'
### Dagger
The dagger is like a sword but it has a much faster attack speed. It also has a lower range than the sword

![Crafting for the dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/039b5622e72d0baaadc1850c111ff118e65edbdd.png)
### Battleaxe
The Battleaxe does the most damage out of any weapon. Because of this it also has the slowest attack speed.

![Battleaxe crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2fe9d60b03168803b57340e05aa714b286644fd.png)
### Spear
The spear has the greatest range and is ment to be used to break combos, but it has a slow attack speed so you can't combo other players with it.

![Spear crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2f4f84d98f8e67b9946ad916c1866c2a772e371.png)

## Copper tools
Copper tools act as a middlegroud between stone and iron. They have the same durability as stone tools but the same stats as iron tools.

![Copper Pickaxe Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd2e6668e99801ad57dd3d24a48ee7da242bc03d.png)

## Totems
These totems are items that you can hold in your offhand that give you special buffs inspired by the relics from [Drehmal Apotheosis](https://www.drehmal.net/). You can craft them or get them as drops from the Evoker.
### Totem of Speed
Gives you +0.1 more speed when in your hands

![Totem of Speed crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c087d352ce80a2921dcd9a72e2c89f49655b0489.png)
### Totem of Health
Gives you 4 extra hearts when in your hands

![Totem of Health crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8ac44447100c3aa08d430fe1f325ecd7baff6f7.png)
### Totem of Defense
Gives you 2 extra armor and 1 extra armor toughness when in hands

![Totem of Defense crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bffda832867fce6ee75a8a701d50852edbad4728.png)
## Other features
### Iron Apples
An iron apple is similar to a golden apple but it gives you strength and resistance, and also absorption if its the enchanted varient.

![Iron Apple crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ba9c52a102196407aada99b4d7f1fbfe750ba18.png)
![Enchanted Iron Apple crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b78bfd5589c3c645ffa62f5f8c2db8070ee3d831.png)

### Various Crafting Recipes
![Enchanted Golden Apple crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9942d479bc95244eb6dbc14874d12557ce28b245.png)

![Totem of Undying crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a85212358091de46b3df922c98c35da7bebd39bd.png)
